news.t: Apple Has the Right Stuff for More Upside
Apple's Standout Q2 Earnings Open Up ETF Opportunities
New Look at Apple Could Put These ETFs in Focus

holdings.infoBox: AAPU is an equity ETF with a total of 18 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt stock at 38.28%, Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins at 29.81%, Apple at 17.51%, Goldman Sachs Fin Gov 465 Institut at 11.93%, and Apple Inc Swap at 10.30%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily AAPL Bull 2X ETF (AAPU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Apple stock. AAPU was launched on Aug 9, 2022 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Apple Has the Right Stuff for More Upside
data.text: Apple (AAPL) recently delivered results for the March quarter, but the technology giant still has plenty of catalysts that could spark the Direxion Daily AAPL Bull 2X Shares (AAPU).
